assertions.title: Error state — UI displays error when .bropilot directory is missing

steps.observed: Could not safely remove/rename shared .bropilot under shared running services

evidence.network: Precondition not safely achievable in shared isolation

assertions.issues: Blocked by shared-service isolation: creating a missing .bropilot condition would require disruptive shared state mutation.

assertions.title: Error state — UI displays error when extracting before starting

steps.action: Attempt forced pre-start extraction via component method
steps.observed: Shared backend had persistent domain worker from prior runs; unable to reach no-worker state without restarting shared service

evidence.network: Could not isolate no-worker condition in shared session

assertions.issues: Blocked by shared global DomainWorker lifecycle and non-disruptive rule (no shared service restart).

steps.expected: Malformed-output specific error + verify state not advanced

assertions.issues: Blocked: malformed-output scenario not controllable in shared environment; status-verification endpoint from contract is unavailable.

frictions.description: Domain page starts extraction mode from server default and did not expose a UI control for mock mode; default path initially hit rate limits.
frictions.resolution: Used in-browser fetch patch to force POST /api/domain/start body {mode:"mock"} for deterministic Act 2 checks.

frictions.description: Contract expectations for no-worker/missing-project error paths were hard to isolate under shared running services with global DomainWorker lifecycle.
frictions.resolution: Marked impacted assertions blocked per isolation constraints.

blockers.description: Could not safely create missing .bropilot precondition in shared environment without disrupting other validators.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Tried non-destructive UI/API paths only; skipped filesystem mutation of shared project root.

blockers.description: Could not reliably reach "domain worker not started" state because worker persists globally and no safe stop endpoint exists.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Attempted pre-start extraction trigger via Alpine method; backend worker remained present from shared flow history.

blockers.description: Malformed LLM-output scenario could not be deterministically induced, and contract-referenced GET /api/domain/status endpoint was unavailable for state confirmation.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Exercised extraction error path and confirmed UI error handling, but malformed-output-specific state check remained unavailable.

summary: Tested 29 assertions: 20 passed, 6 failed, 3 blocked. Key failures: Solution page did not show Step 3 domain model data (VAL-ACT2-023), mobile overflow at 375px (VAL-ACT2-024), missing /traceability and /er routes caused cross-page failures (VAL-CROSS-060/081), connect page had no active sidebar state (VAL-CROSS-061), and partial-pipeline Solution behavior did not match expected pending-spec state (VAL-CROSS-080).
